_rationale: QA-discovered schema drift. Go emits `timestamp`, `memory_alloc_mb`, `memory_total_mb`, `memory_heap_mb`, and `num_goroutines`; C++ emits `memory_rss_mb` and `num_threads` instead. This red test keeps the mismatch visible until the status JSON contract is aligned.

tiers._rationale_ignore: BASE_IGNORE_NON_DETERMINISM applies implicitly (pid/timestamp/elapsed_ms/version/jsonrpc envelope etc.); this list captures the descriptor-specific drift beyond the universal baseline.
